description-resumed: experienced developer in django and react, with projects in production
about-me-description-1: My name is Endryus, I am 19 years old, and I am currently pursuing a degree in Software Engineering. My main focus is systems development, and I am building my career in the technology field by continuously expanding my knowledge of software engineering. I am dedicated to learning, passionate about new technologies, and always looking for opportunities to improve my skills, develop new projects, and gain practical experience.
about-me-description-2: I have experience with Python, Django, PostgreSQL, MySQL, HTML, CSS, JavaScript, TypeScript, C++, PHP, and React, as well as other frameworks and tools. I also have experience with Linux server administration, including managing real-world production environments. In addition, I have a solid understanding of computer hardware and have previously worked in hardware-related roles.
about-me-description-3: My main soft skills include teamwork, organization, time management, critical thinking, effective communication, and the ability to quickly learn new technologies.
